name: Drunken Sweet Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 pounds grated sweet potato (1 large spud)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the smoker for grilling, bringing the temperature to 200-220 degrees.
2. In a cast-iron skillet or smokeproof baking dish, melt the butter.
3. Stir in the sweet potatoes and spread them into a thick, even layer.
4. Sprinkle the brown sugar and salt over the potatoes.
5. Transfer the potatoes to the smoker and cook for 1 hour.
6. Stir in 3 tablespoons of tequila and half of the lime juice. Spread the potatoes back down evenly.
7. Continue cooking the potatoes another 50 to 60 minutes, until they are tender but have crispy edges.
8. Remove the potatoes from the smoker and stir in the remaining tequila and lime juice.
9. Serve warm.
